title: polypodium fossum
intro: Polypodium fossum, also known as Indian fern, is a species of flowering plant in the family Polypodiaceae. It is traditionally used in Ayurvedic medicine due to its medicinal properties, particularly its anti-inflammatory, antiseptic, and antioxidant properties. The health benefits of Polypodium fossum include its potential to alleviate symptoms of fever, rheumatism, and respiratory issues, as well as its ability to protect against oxidative stress and promote wound healing. In herbal preparations, Polypodium fossum is often used in combination with other herbs to create tonics, decoctions, and poultices that are applied topically or ingested to harness its medicinal benefits.
